disclosure: This file lists every remote API call Faraday makes. In the dev build, the ONLY remote calls are one-time model downloads from Hugging Face (open weights, no user data transmitted). In the evidence build (EVIDENCE_BUILD=true), ALL model weights are sideloaded, the android.permission.INTERNET permission is removed from the manifest by the strip-internet-permission config plugin, and the JS egress trap blocks fetch/XHR. Zero remote API calls occur in the evidence build.

api_calls.purpose: One-time model weight download (dev build only)
